name: Apple Meringue
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Granny Smith apples or any tart apple
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and slice apples, not too thin.
2. Make a syrup with the water and sugar. Add the spices, apples, and raisins. Cook covered until tender but still hold their shape.
3. Add the liqueur and honey to the apple mixture. Place in a baking dish.
4. To make Italian Meringue:
a. Stir sugar and water over heat until sugar is completely dissolved. Let cook until a thick syrup forms.
b. Meanwhile, whip egg whites with an electric beater until they form soft peaks.
c. Slowly pour the hot syrup into the whites while beating all along until cool.
5. Spread meringue on top of apples.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until golden. Chill.
You may substitute for pears, bananas, or use your imagination.
